reports.title: headroom
reports.summary: 把工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 分块在送入大模型前先压缩，减少 60%–95% 的 token 消耗。
reports.content: Repository: chopratejas / headroom. Trending today on GitHub. Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server..
